description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural light brown finish. The front face features four open shelves, each evenly spaced and capable of holding books, tools, or other small items. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a clean, minimalist appearance. The top surface is flat and can be used as an additional support area for objects. The construction appears to be sturdy, with visible joinery at the corners, suggesting durability for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the shelves are open for easy access.
description: A light brown wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and solid sides, designed for storage and display. Its minimalist, sturdy build makes it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Back view with a solid wooden panel, identical to the side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also showing a solid wooden panel with no openings.
